- Each index is optimized for the morphological features of its language (plurals, possessives, etc.), for both documents and queries.

Each index contains all documents available on CanLII, across all languages. If CanLII has official translations, the index includes only the translation corresponding to the index's language.

Thank you for taking the time to send us your questions and comments. We at CanLII hope to improve the services we offer by ensuring that they are as practical and efficient as possible. Please come back if you have any more feedback for us. Your input is greatly appreciated.

metadata.title: Search Results | CanLII
metadata.DC.title: Canadian Legal Information Institute
metadata.description: CanLII is a non-profit organization managed by the Federation of Law Societies of Canada. CanLII's goal is to make Canadian law accessible for free on the Internet. This website provides access to court judgments, tribunal decisions, statutes and regulations from all Canadian jurisdictions.
